export class EditGangComposer{/**
     * Edit an existing gang's appearance.
     * @param primaryColor Hex string (with or without '#'), e.g. "#FF0000" or "FF0000"
     * @param secondaryColor Hex string (with or without '#')
     * @param icon Icon id/slug (e.g. "crown") that maps to /icons/badges/{icon}.png
     */constructor(primaryColor,secondaryColor,icon){this._data=void 0;this._data=[primaryColor,secondaryColor,icon];console.log('[📤] EditGangComposer packet sent:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){return;}}
